sources: Technical Analysis Using Multiple Timeframes by Brian Shannon
Pring on Price Patterns by Martin Pring
metadata.description: Exhaustive Static Rulebook for Midnight Sovereign Pattern Agent

stage_1_accumulation.math: Price crossing moving averages; 200 SMA flattening. Moving averages (10, 20, 50) begin to cross above and below each other. Contraction of price ranges.
stage_1_accumulation.psychology: Boredom, skepticism, numbness, complacency, and denial. Gradual shift in control from sellers to a neutral environment. Institutional quiet accumulation.
stage_1_accumulation.action: Avoid trend trading. Monitor for higher lows, increased volume, and frequent tests of resistance near the end of the stage for AVWAP/resistance breakout.

stage_2_markup.math: Price > 10 SMA > 20 SMA > 50 SMA > 200 SMA. All SMAs have positive slope. Higher highs and higher lows.
stage_2_markup.psychology: Greed, thrill, belief, optimism, and fear of missing out. Short sellers trapped (fear). Trend becomes obvious and participation accelerates.
stage_2_markup.action: Aggressively scale positions via Fractional Kelly. Buy on strength or shallow pullbacks. Lock in partial profits on signs of tiring.

stage_3_distribution.math: Price breaks short-term SMAs; 20/50 SMA crossing. 200 SMA flattening. High volatility and price contraction.
stage_3_distribution.psychology: Euphoria transitioning to anxiety and denial. Institutional unloading to retail. Buyers lose conviction as momentum stalls.
stage_3_distribution.action: Lock profits. Veto new long positions. Monitor for trend confusion and downward SMA crossovers.

stage_4_decline.math: Price < 10 SMA < 20 SMA < 50 SMA < 200 SMA. 200 SMA slope < 0. Lower highs and lower lows.
stage_4_decline.psychology: Panic, capitulation, fear, depression, and despair. Sellers aggressively control the trend.
stage_4_decline.action: Maintain cash or aggressively initiate short setups.

rectangle.structure: Horizontal range bounded by parallel resistance and support lines touched at least twice.
rectangle.psychology: Protracted trench warfare between accumulation and distribution. Evenly matched buyers and sellers.
rectangle.volume_confirmation: Volume must generally shrink during consolidation and spike >150% of average on breakout.
vision_failure_markers: Pinocchio Bar (Whipsaw) creating a false break
Breakout on declining or weak volume
Price falls back into the pattern violating a minor low

symmetrical_triangle.structure: Converging higher lows and lower highs indicating a price coil. Touched multiple times.
symmetrical_triangle.psychology: Diminishing volatility leading to a dramatic imbalance between buyers and sellers. Fine balance before an explosive move.
symmetrical_triangle.volume_confirmation: Progressive volume contraction into the apex. Explosion of volume on breakout.
vision_failure_markers: Breakout occurring too deep into apex (>75%)
Lack of volume on thrust
Whipsaw fakeouts

ascending_triangle.structure: Flat upper resistance with rising lower support line.
ascending_triangle.psychology: Buyers are increasingly aggressive, willing to buy at higher prices, while sellers hold firm at a specific resistance level.
ascending_triangle.volume_confirmation: Drying up on pullbacks, expanding on advances toward resistance. Strong volume on breakout.
vision_failure_markers: Spring/Upthrust failing to hold breakout level
Low volume on breakout

descending_triangle.structure: Flat lower support with a declining upper resistance line.
descending_triangle.psychology: Sellers are increasingly aggressive, willing to sell at lower prices, while buyers hold firm at a specific support level.
descending_triangle.volume_confirmation: Volume expands on declines toward support and shrinks on rallies.
vision_failure_markers: Bear trap failing to hold breakdown level
Unusual volume expansion on upside retracements

head_and_shoulders_top.structure: Final rally (Head) flanked by two smaller rallies (Shoulders) on a common neckline.
head_and_shoulders_top.psychology: Exhaustion of buying power. Transition from advancing peaks to declining peaks. Distribution from strong to weak hands.
head_and_shoulders_top.volume_confirmation: Heaviest volume on the left shoulder, lighter on head, lightest on right shoulder. Heavy volume on neckline break.
vision_failure_markers: Neckline break fails to hold (Bear Trap)
Right shoulder shakeout (falsely breaks above resistance)
Expanding volume on right shoulder rally

reverse_head_and_shoulders_bottom.structure: Final decline (Head) flanked by two smaller declines (Shoulders) on a common neckline.
reverse_head_and_shoulders_bottom.psychology: Exhaustion of selling pressure. Transition from declining troughs to rising troughs. Accumulation by strong hands.
reverse_head_and_shoulders_bottom.volume_confirmation: Heavy volume on left shoulder/head, contracting on right shoulder decline, huge expansion on upside breakout.
vision_failure_markers: Neckline break fails to hold (Bull Trap)
Lack of volume explosion on upside breakout

double_top_and_bottom.structure: Two peaks at roughly the same price level (Top) or two troughs at the same level (Bottom).
double_top_and_bottom.psychology: Failure to push past a previously established extreme. Exhaustion and ultimate reversal of trend.
double_top_and_bottom.volume_confirmation: Volume should be noticeably lighter on the second peak (or trough) and expand drastically on the reversal breakout.
vision_failure_markers: Volume is heavier on the second peak
Failure to break the intervening trough/peak

broadening_formation.structure: Expanding price range with higher highs and lower lows (reverse of a triangle).
broadening_formation.psychology: Highly emotional, out-of-control market. Lack of sponsorship from smart money. Extreme volatility.
broadening_formation.volume_confirmation: Irregular and expanding volume as the pattern widens.
vision_failure_markers: Premature breakouts
Trendless volume behavior

gaps.structure: A blank space on the chart where no trading occurred.
gaps.psychology: Emotional reaction to news or panic/euphoria. Left behind spaces represent dynamic support/resistance.
gaps.volume_confirmation: High volume on Breakaway Gaps; climax volume on Exhaustion Gaps.
vision_failure_markers: Gap is quickly filled (closed), negating the momentum

outside_and_inside_bars.structure: Outside bar fully engulfs the prior bar's range. Inside bar is completely contained within the prior bar's range.
outside_and_inside_bars.psychology: Outside bar shows a dramatic battle and reversal of control. Inside bar shows extreme equilibrium and indecision.
outside_and_inside_bars.volume_confirmation: High volume on an outside reversal bar confirms the trend change.
vision_failure_markers: Lack of volume on outside bar
Inside bar breakout failing to follow through

pinocchio_bars_and_key_reversals.structure: Long wicks breaking a support/resistance level but closing back within the range.
pinocchio_bars_and_key_reversals.psychology: A 'lie' or trap. The market rejects the extreme price level, shaking out weak hands.
pinocchio_bars_and_key_reversals.volume_confirmation: Climax volume on the extreme wick, showing absorption by smart money.
vision_failure_markers: Bar fails to close significantly back inside the range
Low volume at the extreme wick

vision_agent_directives.skeptical_auditor_prompt: Reject assets trading in the middle of a consolidation range. Only approve charts where the current daily candle has decisively broken structural resistance on visually expanding volume, or is emerging from a tightly coiled bull flag.
vision_agent_directives.avwap_validation: Ensure current price is respecting the AVWAP anchored to the most recent earnings gap or multi-month low.
vision_agent_directives.false_breakout_checks: Check if price falls back into the pattern violating a minor low (for longs) or minor high (for shorts). Verify if breakout lacks required volume expansion.
